results.title: RxDB
results.description: RxDB is a local-first, NoSQL database for JavaScript applications that offers reactive subscriptions to state changes and supports real-time replication with various backends.

results.title: RxDB
results.description: RxDB is a JavaScript database designed for building offline-first, real-time applications. It supports various JavaScript runtimes and offers a powerful sync engine for seamless data synchronization between clients and servers.

results.title: HelixDB
results.description: HelixDB is a high-performance, open-source graph-vector database written in Rust, optimized for RAG and AI applications with native support for graph and vector data types.

results.title: duckdb-rs
results.description: duckdb-rs is an ergonomic wrapper for using DuckDB from Rust. It attempts to expose an interface similar to rusqlite.

results.title: RocksDB
results.description: RocksDB is a high-performance embedded key-value store written in C++. This project provides a Rust wrapper for RocksDB, enabling its use in Rust applications.

results.title: python-rocksdb
results.description: python-rocksdb provides Python bindings to the C++ interface of RocksDB, a high-performance embedded database, using Cython.

results.title: AsterixDB
results.description: AsterixDB is an open-source, distributed, and extensible data management system designed for managing semi-structured data and enabling complex analytical queries.

results.title: Redis RDB CLI
results.description: Redis rdb CLI  : A CLI tool that can parse, filter, split, merge rdb and analyze memory usage offline. It can also sync 2 redis data and allow user define their own sink service to migrate redis data to somewhere.

results.title: RDB
results.description: A Go-implemented Redis RDB parser for secondary development and memory analysis, offering features like memory reporting, RDB to JSON/AOF conversion, and key analysis.

results.title: ArcadeDB
results.description: ArcadeDB is a multi-model DBMS built for extreme performance, supporting graph, document, and key-value models with ACID transactions and advanced security.

results.title: GraphDB
results.description: GraphDB is a highly efficient, scalable, and robust graph database (triplestore) with RDF and SPARQL support, offering real-time semantic inferencing, LLM Graph RAG capabilities, and integration with external search applications.

results.title: OrientDB
results.description: OrientDB is the most versatile DBMS supporting Graph, Document, Reactive, Full-Text and Geospatial models in one Multi-Model product. OrientDB can run distributed (Multi-Master), supports SQL, ACID Transactions, Full-Text indexing and Reactive Queries.

results.title: RavenDB
results.description: RavenDB is an open-source, modern ACID NoSQL database that combines extreme performance with ease-of-use, offering a state-of-the-art web UI and supporting all major platforms.

results.title: hash_db
results.description: A Rust crate providing traits for database-like structures, enabling storage of byte-slices keyed by their hash or a fixed type.

results.title: RocksDB
results.description: A library that provides an embeddable, persistent key-value store for fast storage.

results.title: RDB
results.description: A library for parsing, dumping, and verifying RDB files and values up to version 11.

results.title: YDB
results.description: YDB is an open-source Distributed SQL Database combining high availability, scalability, strict consistency, and ACID transactions for demanding OLTP workloads.

results.title: RavenDB
results.description: RavenDB is a transactional, open-source, document-oriented NoSQL database that stores data in JSON format, offering features like ACID transactions, indexing, and full-text search.

results.title: DuckDB RS
results.description: An ergonomic Rust wrapper for DuckDB, enabling type-safe bindings, native data format reading/writing, and custom extension creation in Rust.

results.title: QuestDB
results.description: QuestDB is an open-source time-series database offering fast ingestion and low-latency SQL queries, built with Java, C++, and Rust for high performance and efficiency.

results.title: SurrealDB
results.description: SurrealDB is a native, open-source, multi-model database that unifies relational, document, graph, time-series, vector, search, and geospatial data. It uses a SQL-like query language (SurrealQL) and is built for distributed scalability.

results.title: Rat Quickdb
results.description: A powerful cross-database ODM (Object-Document Mapper) library providing a unified interface for SQLite, PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB with features like automatic indexing, connection pooling, and intelligent caching.

results.title: KeyDB
results.description: KeyDB is a high-performance, multithreaded fork of Redis offering features like Active Replication, FLASH Storage, and Subkey Expires, while maintaining full Redis protocol compatibility.

results.title: PDB
results.description: A Rust library for parsing Microsoft PDB (Program Database) files, which contain debugging information produced by most compilers targeting Windows.

results.title: Rxdi
results.description: Rxdi is a powerful, independent, and reactive dependency injection container built with TypeScript and RxJS 6, designed for use in both browser and Node.js environments, with capabilities for decentralized module management via IPFS.

results.title: trie_db
results.description: trie_db is a Rust library providing an interface and implementation for Merkle-Patricia tries, functioning as a key-value datastore. It also supports the generation and verification of compact proofs for these tries.

results.title: RethinkDB
results.description: RethinkDB is an open-source, distributed, NoSQL database designed for building scalable real-time web applications with automatic failover and fault tolerance.

results.title: SahomeDB
results.description: SahomeDB is a lightweight, embedded vector database written in Rust, inspired by SQLite, and utilizing HNSW for indexing, suitable for AI applications and RAG.

results.title: RCSB PDB Data API
results.description: The RCSB PDB Data API provides access to metadata, molecule names, sequences, and experimental details for experimental structures and Computed Structure Models (CSMs) from the Protein Data Bank (PDB) using both REST-based and GraphQL-based APIs.

results.title: RDR3 NativeDB
results.description: A community-maintained database of RDR3 information, including script commands (natives) with examples and object screenshots, designed to power RedLookup.com.
